title: The Importance of Being Earnest
actors: Michael Redgrave, Richard Wattis, Michael Denison
plot: After Algernon discovers that his friend Ernest, has created a fictional brother for whenever he needs a reason to escape dull country life, Algernon poses as the brother, resulting in ever-increasing confusion.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 win & 2 nominations total
